.. dotflat documentation master file, created by
   sphinx-quickstart on Fri Jul  5 12:55:51 2024.
   You can adapt this file completely to your liking, but it should at least
   contain the root `toctree` directive.


Dotflat documentation
===================================

This documentation is designed to help you start dealing with Dotflat.
It covers Dotflat as a concept, explains the main ways to utilize Dotflat, more detailed information about smart contracts of the system and advanced topics for more complex applications and use cases.


Contents
==================

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 4
   :glob:

   pages/voting-bot.rst
   pages/seealso.rst
